repo_notes.content: Vite 7 + React 19 app (hello-world-app). Entry: src/main.jsx renders App in StrictMode. App uses react-router-dom (BrowserRouter) with routes in App.jsx. Page components live in src/pages/; shared UI in src/components/. No authentication or cui/ folder in this repo.
repo_notes.author: Team Lead

pages.title: Project overview
pages.purpose: Stack (Vite, React, ESLint), scripts (dev, build, lint, preview), and high-level src layout.

pages.title: Routing and app shell
pages.purpose: BrowserRouter, Routes for / and /hello, flex layout, and Navbar with react-router Link navigation.

pages.title: Home page
pages.purpose: Route / — welcome heading and placeholder body copy.

pages.title: Hello World page
pages.purpose: Route /hello — hello-world heading and original scaffold-style body text.
